metadata.description: PsyReaSFX is a high-performance sound asset browser, audition, waveform, metadata, region, collection, REAPER insertion, and Transfer workflow.

version.name: 0.7.12-beta.16
version.author: Psysia
version.changelog: - Replaces the multichannel Popup with an inline main-window channel rail. - Keeps audition and application shortcuts available while choosing channels. - Adds click, Ctrl/Shift selection, hover-scoped Ctrl+A, and right-click lane focus. - Responsively fits channel controls without a horizontal scrollbar. - Reuses the toolbar vector logo and Orbitron wordmark in About.
